name: VELLUM Tracker
author: VELLUM Preset
description: Floating illuminated tracker + long-term Chronicle + auto-summary memory + Vault (in-app lorebook) for the VELLUM Living Narrative Engine. Parses <ledger>/[BTS], maintains a persistent Chronicle (arcs, threads, events, shifts), autonomously summarizes older turns into keyworded chapter-memories via background generation, recalls scene-relevant entries + memories through the interceptor, and lets you build & manage world books (lorebooks) and promote chronicle entries into them — no separate lorebook UI needed. Renders a floating window plus Chronicle, Cast, and Vault tabs.
